chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-4937 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No.20243/2021 2. For hearing of main case. 22-01-2025. Mr. Aziz-ur-Rehman Advocate holds brief for Mr. Saifullah Sachwani Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Khalid Rajpar Advocate for the Respondent Nos. 2 and 3 Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel for the Department files compliance report, which is taken on record. Learned counsel states that provisional release has been made and final assessment of the GD is pending due to this petition. Learned counsel states that it may be just and proper to dispose of this petition with direction that GD is finally assessed after providing opportunity of hearing to the Petitioner. Order accordingly. The Petitioner would remain at liberty to assail any findings, if aggrieved, subject to the law. Petition is disposed of as aforesaid along with listed application. Judge Judge Amjad PS
